---
title: "nitrix.morphology"
generated: true
signature-hash: f7e03b2547d67319
description: "Mathematical morphology built atop the semiring substrate."
listing:
  id: nitrix-morphology-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-morphology/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.morphology`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Mathematical morphology built atop the semiring substrate.

The user-facing API takes single-channel arrays `(..., *spatial)` with
no explicit channel dimension. Callers with multi-channel inputs should
`jax.vmap` over the channel axis.

Semiring-backed (specialisations of [`semiring_conv`](nitrix-semiring-conv/semiring_conv.qmd)):

- [`dilate`](nitrix-morphology/dilate.qmd) -- a [`TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS.qmd) convolution.
- [`erode`](nitrix-morphology/erode.qmd) -- a [`TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS.qmd) convolution (with the
  structuring element reflected per the standard mathematical-morphology
  convention).
- [`open`](nitrix-morphology/open.qmd) -- erode then dilate.
- [`close`](nitrix-morphology/close.qmd) -- dilate then erode.
- [`distance_transform`](nitrix-morphology/distance_transform.qmd) -- an exact Euclidean distance transform by
  default (separable, each axis a [`TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS.qmd) matmul against
  the squared-distance matrix, reusing the semiring Pallas-CUDA kernel),
  with an opt-in chamfer engine (`metric="chebyshev"` /
  `"city_block"` / a custom structuring element) on the iterative
  [`TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS.qmd) convolution substrate.
- [`distance_transform_edt`](nitrix-morphology/distance_transform_edt.qmd) -- the exact-Euclidean path exposed under
  the scipy-compatible name.

Gather-backed:

- [`median_filter`](nitrix-morphology/median_filter.qmd) -- a gather followed by `jnp.median`. Explicitly
  not a semiring op, because the state size is unbounded in the kernel
  loop.

Labelling:

- [`connected_components`](nitrix-morphology/connected_components.qmd) / [`largest_connected_component`](nitrix-morphology/largest_connected_component.qmd) --
  N-dimensional connected-components labelling by a jit-able fixed-point
  label-propagation scheme (the recurring mask clean-up and
  largest-region step).

Convenience:

- `susan_emulator` -- composes `bilateral_gaussian` and
  [`median_filter`](nitrix-morphology/median_filter.qmd). It raises `NotImplementedError` until
  `smoothing.bilateral_gaussian` lands; this is a deliberate deferral.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-morphology-symbols}
:::
